_instructions: Edit this file each day with today's strikeout prop lines before the predict workflow runs. Match 'pitcher' to the exact name MLB Stats API uses (First Last). 'over_price' / 'under_price' are American odds, e.g. -115. Delete this whole file's contents back to an empty 'lines' array when done for the day, or just overwrite it tomorrow — predict_today.py only reads today's date.
